title: D4vd appears relaxed in court during murder case status hearing in Los Angeles
summary_full: Singer D4vd, David Burke, appeared in a Los Angeles courtroom for a status hearing in his murder case. Charged in connection with the death of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez, Burke pleaded not guilty. Lawyers discussed evidence exchange and case timelines, with the next hearing set for June 17 and the preliminary hearing on June 29.
